Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

data.reasoningText: The user wants me to build the .NET project in both Debug and Release configurations and create binary logs (binlogs) for each build. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-59d254f928ff4d97b6ab9acfc3ba4463 && dotnet build -c Debug -bl:debug.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---DEBUG BUILD DONE---" && dotnet build -c Release -bl:release.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---RELEASE BUILD DONE---"
arguments.description: Build in Debug and Release with binlogs

data.content:
Both builds succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors. The binlog files are ready:

- **`debug.binlog`** — Debug configuration build log
- **`release.binlog`** — Release configuration build log

You can view them with `dotnet build-server` or the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/).
